# Feature Spec: HTML Structure & Base Styles

**FEAT-ID**: FEAT-001  
**Plan**: plan_todo_app.md  
**Status**: In Progress

## Objective

Create the foundational HTML structure and CSS styling for the to-do app with a professional gray-tone color palette, responsive layout, and semantic markup.

## Context

This is the first feature of the single-file to-do app. It establishes:
- The basic HTML5 document structure
- Semantic HTML elements for the to-do interface
- Complete CSS styling with gray-tone palette
- Mobile-first responsive design using Flexbox/Grid
- CSS custom properties for easy theme maintenance

The file will be ready to accept JavaScript functionality in subsequent features.

## Requirements

### Functional
- HTML5 document with proper meta tags (charset, viewport)
- Semantic HTML structure: header, main, form, list elements
- Responsive layout that adapts from 320px (mobile) to 1920px+ (desktop)
- Accessible form input with label (even if visually hidden)

### Non-Functional
- Gray-tone color palette following the suggested scheme
- Clean, modern aesthetic with appropriate spacing and typography
- CSS organized with custom properties for colors, spacing, and typography
- No external dependencies (no CSS frameworks or icon libraries)

### Design Specifications

**Color Palette (Gray Tones):**
- Background: #f5f5f5 (light gray)
- Container: #ffffff (white)
- Borders: #e0e0e0 (light border)
- Text primary: #212121 (dark gray)
- Text secondary: #616161 (medium gray)
- Accent: #9e9e9e (neutral gray)

**Typography:**
- Font family: System font stack (Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, sans-serif)
- Base size: 16px
- Heading size: 28-32px

**Spacing:**
- Container padding: 20-24px
- Element margins: 12-16px
- Max container width: 600px (centered)

**Layout:**
- Mobile-first: Single column, full-width elements
- Desktop: Centered container with max-width

## Tasks

### TASK-001: Create HTML5 Document Structure

**Implementation:**
- Create `index.html` in the project root
- Add DOCTYPE, html tag with lang attribute
- Include head section with:
  - UTF-8 charset meta tag
  - Viewport meta tag for responsive design
  - Title: "To-Do App"
  - Style tag (empty initially, populated in TASK-002)
- Include body section with:
  - Main container div (class: `container`)
  - Header with h1 title
  - Form element for task input (id: `todo-form`)
    - Input field (type: text, id: `todo-input`, placeholder: "Add a new task...")
    - Submit button (type: submit, text: "Add")
  - Task list section (id: `todo-list`, initially empty ul)
- Include script tag at end of body (empty, for future JS)

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification:
- [ ] HTML validates with W3C validator
- [ ] Viewport meta tag present for mobile responsiveness
- [ ] Semantic HTML elements used (main, header, form, ul)
- [ ] All IDs and classes match specification

**Documentation Update:**
Add inline HTML comments:
- Document the purpose of each major section (header, form, list)
- Note that CSS and JS will be added in subsequent features

---

### TASK-002: Implement Gray-Tone CSS Styling

**Implementation:**
- Inside the `<style>` tag in the head, add CSS in this order:
  1. **CSS Reset & Base Styles:**
     - Universal box-sizing: border-box
     - Remove default margins/padding
     - Set body font-family to system stack
     - Set body background to #f5f5f5
     - Set base font-size to 16px, line-height to 1.5
     - Set text color to #212121
  
  2. **CSS Custom Properties (in :root):**
     ```css
     --color-bg: #f5f5f5;
     --color-container: #ffffff;
     --color-border: #e0e0e0;
     --color-text-primary: #212121;
     --color-text-secondary: #616161;
     --color-accent: #9e9e9e;
     --spacing-sm: 12px;
     --spacing-md: 16px;
     --spacing-lg: 24px;
     --border-radius: 8px;
     --shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
     ```
  
  3. **Container Styles:**
     - `.container`: max-width 600px, margin auto, padding var(--spacing-lg)
     - Background white, border-radius, box-shadow
     - Margin-top: 40px for desktop spacing
  
  4. **Header Styles:**
     - `h1`: font-size 32px, margin-bottom var(--spacing-lg), text-align center
     - Color: var(--color-text-primary)
  
  5. **Form Styles:**
     - `#todo-form`: display flex, gap var(--spacing-sm), margin-bottom var(--spacing-lg)
     - `#todo-input`: flex 1, padding var(--spacing-md), border 2px solid var(--color-border)
       - border-radius var(--border-radius), font-size 16px
       - focus state: outline none, border-color var(--color-accent)
     - `button[type="submit"]`: padding var(--spacing-md) var(--spacing-lg)
       - Background var(--color-text-primary), color white, border none
       - border-radius var(--border-radius), cursor pointer, font-size 16px
       - hover state: opacity 0.8
  
  6. **List Styles:**
     - `#todo-list`: list-style none, padding 0, margin 0
     - Prepare for future task item styles (will be added in FEAT-002)

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification:
- [ ] Gray-tone palette applied correctly (inspect computed styles)
- [ ] Container centered with max-width 600px
- [ ] Form elements styled with proper spacing and borders
- [ ] Custom properties defined and used throughout
- [ ] Visual inspection matches design specifications

**Documentation Update:**
Add CSS comments:
- Document each section (Reset, Custom Properties, Container, etc.)
- Note color palette values and their usage
- Explain responsive approach (mobile-first)

---

### TASK-003: Implement Responsive Layout

**Implementation:**
- Add media query for mobile devices (max-width: 600px):
  - `.container`: margin-top 0, border-radius 0, min-height 100vh
  - Adjust padding to var(--spacing-md) for tighter mobile spacing
  - `h1`: font-size 28px
  - `#todo-form`: Consider stacking on very small screens if needed (optional)

- Ensure form inputs scale properly:
  - Input font-size: 16px (prevents iOS zoom on focus)
  - Button min-width for touch targets (44px height minimum)

**Unit Tests:**
Manual verification:
- [ ] Test at 320px width (smallest mobile)
- [ ] Test at 375px width (iPhone SE)
- [ ] Test at 768px width (tablet)
- [ ] Test at 1920px width (desktop)
- [ ] Form remains usable at all breakpoints
- [ ] No horizontal scrolling at any size

**Documentation Update:**
Add comments explaining:
- Mobile-first approach
- Breakpoint choice (600px)
- Touch target sizing for accessibility

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Valid HTML5 document with semantic structure
- [ ] Professional gray-tone color palette applied
- [ ] Responsive layout works from 320px to 1920px+
- [ ] CSS custom properties used for maintainability
- [ ] Form is functional (can type and click submit, though no JS behavior yet)
- [ ] All inline comments present explaining structure and approach
- [ ] Single file approach maintained (no external CSS files)

## Testing Notes

Since this is a single-file HTML app with no build process:
1. Open `index.html` directly in browser
2. Manually verify all acceptance criteria
3. Test responsiveness using browser DevTools device emulation
4. Validate HTML with W3C validator

## Out of Scope

- JavaScript functionality (FEAT-002)
- Task item styling (FEAT-002)
- Animations (FEAT-004)
- Completed task styles (FEAT-003)

## Dependencies

None — this is the foundational feature.

## Notes

- Using Unicode symbols for icons (trash, checkmark) in later features to avoid external dependencies
- System font stack chosen for best performance and native OS appearance
- CSS transitions will be added in FEAT-004 for animations
